/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/key_protect_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/key_protect_test.dir/key_protect_test_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/key_protect_test.dir/examples/key_protect_test.cpp.o -o key_protect_test  libqsecure.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -largon2 -loqs
